title: Utilities
description: Rich coded accessories to enchant your game
body:
Terraria style. This mod adds rich coded accessories from Terraria. There are totals of 26 accessories, including 3 boots and 4 informational accessories. _I tried to balance these items perfectly, but if you have any suggestions to buff/nerf some accessories you can write to me on github page or comment on curseforge. Have any new item idea? Write to me also._ All items you can insert into given Trinket slot. There are 4 informational items (displays info on left-mid screen), the rest are items that you put in right trinket slot. Where can I find these items?
- most items generates in vanilla chests e.g. village chests or any other vanilla structures

A bit of showcase. Few items for demonstration


Dependencies

> [Trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets-fabric) [![](https://www.cebuliony.pl/trinketsicon.png "")](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets-fabric "") > [Cloth config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) [![](https://ik.imagekit.io/o532f5vcp38/cloth_BdRa3OFvj.png?ik-sdk-version=javascript-1.4.3&updatedAt=1652995012608)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) **Any other problems/suggestions post on [Github](https://github.com/ImExoOdeex/SupplementaryAccessories "")**
